Outcomes: Singapore Sports School develops student-athletes to excel in sports and academics, preparing them for national and international competitions.
Admissions: Admission is based on sports trials, academic assessments, and interviews to identify potential student-athletes.
Quote: Empowering champions through integrity and resilience, nurturing excellence in every stride of their journey.

Performance.Academic Integration: Where we are not required to provide you with any personal data or make a correction requested by you under the PDPA, any such request for the same shall be refused.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: On 23 August 2004, Sports School created its first through-train post-secondary programme with Auckland University of Technology. High-performing student-athletes could bypass the GCE O-Level examinations to take the Diploma in Sports Management and Exercise Science.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Coaches at Singapore Sports School hold advanced certifications in sports science and have extensive experience in training elite athletes. They employ evidence-based coaching methods to enhance student-athletes' performance and development.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Singapore Sports School provides comprehensive pastoral care, including access to professional counselling services and wellness programs. A dedicated team ensures a supportive community that fosters students' mental and emotional resilience.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including an Olympic-sized swimming pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, and specialized sports labs. These resources support both athletic training and academic pursuits.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through regular performance assessments and feedback sessions. Parents receive detailed reports and are engaged in continuous communication to ensure transparency and support.
